creator: regteston@mail.ru
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Alexey
>Organization:	Home user
>Confidential:	no
>Synopsis:	kern/163890: ps2 keyboard not detected by kernel?
>Severity:	serious
>Priority:	high
>Category:	kern
>Class:		change-request
>Release:	FreeBSD 9.0-i386 release, RC-3 i386 and amd64
>Environment:	GENERIC FreeBSD 9.0 kernel
>Description:
Dear developers!

Sorry, but send information from "dmesg" command not may be possible from my e-mail. BSD mail delivery is notify what Mail.ru is in a black list.

I'am compare two listing from FreeBSD-8.2 and FreeBSD-9.0
And comparison show what bsd kernel of FreeBSD-9 not detect "atkbdc0: Keyboard controller i8042", "atkbd0" and "psm0" device.

>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:
May be not include "atkbdc" source code at compiling kernel?
